headline: Trump tariffs: Customs and Border Protection tells judge it can't comply with refund order
summary: CBP told Court of International Trade Judge Richard Eaton that the total amount of IEEPA tariffs duties collected since last year is about $166 billion.

headline: How Investors Are Reacting To Lowe's (LOW) Cautious 2026 Guidance After Profit Decline
summary: Lowe's Companies reported fourth-quarter 2025 sales of US$20,584 million and full-year 2025 sales of US$86,286 million, while issuing 2026 guidance calling for US$92.00–US$94.00 billion in sales, flat to 2% comparable sales growth, operating margins of 11.2%–11.4%, and diluted EPS of US$11.75–US$12.25. Despite revenue growth, Lowe's full-year net income declined to US$6,654 million and its 2026 earnings outlook came in below prior analyst expectations, sharpening investor focus on how...
